# Extraction Golden Fixture 34584

## State

This is a generated golden fixture from the real gitignored benchmark PDF `34584_Foundations_of_Equivaria.pdf`. The source PDF is not committed; its observed SHA-256 and size are recorded in `fixture-manifest.json` and `freeze-record.json`.

The fixture was produced by the implemented freeze → Docling extraction → independent PDF text-overlap verification → dossier path. No generated paper evidence was hand-authored.
